title: arachnis rohaniana
intro: Arachnis rohaniana, also known as Rohan's orchid, is a species of orchid native to India and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Arachnis rohaniana include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Arachnis rohaniana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties and health benefits.
